note: FINAL iteration (MAX_ITERS=5 reached). Promoted from iteration 4's convergence shadow, whose reviewer panel was SPLIT (3 of 6 agents clean/ready-to-merge; 2 single-source disputed Important). Fixed the clearly-actionable bounded findings; calibrated the disputed is_error finding to advisory.

fix_decisions.claim_text: terminal classification ignores is_error=False; depends on rare 'exit code N' stdout string -> quiet successes dropped, noisy successes -> RESULT_MISSING, candidate over-count
fix_decisions.evidence: OVER-GRADE GATE: single-source (SFH), explicitly DISPUTED by final-pass (praised the classifier as a strength, 'ready to merge') and not raised by code-reviewer/comment-analyzer. Impacts bounded by the conservative/advisory candidate framing (candidates are 'not proven', human-adjudicated). The correct fix is a RESULT_MISSING/candidate-semantics REDESIGN (native transcripts carry is_error but no structured exit code, so 'result missing' cannot be cleanly represented) — beyond a surgical fix-loop change and warranting the author's deliberate design decision. Surfaced in the final report as the top advisory.

fix_decisions.claim_text: a cancelled job (conclusion=cancelled, no job-level start) is admitted via completed_and_ran regardless of started_at
fix_decisions.evidence: Debatable GitHub-Actions semantics (cancelled-while-queued vs cancelled-mid-run). J1 fixed the started_at contract; whether completed_and_ran should also exclude cancelled-without-start is a design decision for the author.

fix_decisions.claim_text: malformed cloud_mappings signaled only via ephemeral stderr, not the durable artifact
fix_decisions.evidence: MEDIUM. F5 already made it a loud stderr degradation. An in-band cloud_mappings_status flag in the durable artifact is an enhancement; parked.

fix_decisions.claim_text: quote-aware split does not handle backslash-escaped quotes
fix_decisions.evidence: Suggestion. Explicitly disclaimed in the comment ('not a full shell parser'); rare in verification commands. Documented limitation.
Suggestion (cosmetic). The real escape protection is _within_repo_root(normalized), which is tested. Harmless dead branch; parked.

fix_decisions.claim_text: performance.input_bytes sums only eligibility_evidence lengths, under-reports true input
fix_decisions.evidence: Sub-threshold (code-reviewer ~65). Telemetry field, drives no conclusion. Parked.

step_3_5_gate.note: J2 quote-aware split verified (quote machine advances, fails safe, no ReDoS); J1 started_at job-level-only verified (comment now true, additive run_started_at, None-safe consumers); --workflows warning correct. Tests non-vacuous. One low-sev Suggestion (backslash-escape) already disclaimed.

skipped_checks.reason: dirty tree at run time; runs clean in CI

terminal_state.shadow_note: 4 convergence shadows run across the loop (Important-count trend 3->3->2->2, the iter-4 pair single-source and disputed). Iteration 5's delta independently blinded-gate-verified clean. A 5th full shadow was not run at the cap: it cannot trigger a 6th fix iteration, the iter-5 delta is gate-clean, and shadow-4's panel was majority ready-to-merge — so shadow agreement is recorded as NOT independently re-verified for the final iter-5 delta beyond the blinded gate. The formal merge signal is deferred to a human /devflow:review by design.
terminal_state.shadow_agreement: not_reverified_post_iter5 (iter-5 delta covered by the blinded fix-delta gate; iter-4 state covered by the full shadow-4 panel)
